_comment: docs-architect v2 hook recipe. Copy the 'hooks' key contents into your .claude/settings.json, merging with any existing hooks. This file is NOT auto-merged by the skill.

hooks.command: awk 'END { if (NR > 100) print "[docs-architect] CLAUDE.md is " NR " lines (v2 target: under 100). Run /docs-audit for guidance." }' CLAUDE.md 2>/dev/null

test -d docs/_lite && find docs/_lite -name '*.summary.md' -not -name '*.deprecated' | head -1 | xargs -I{} echo '[docs-architect] legacy _lite/ files still present. Run /docs-migrate to convert to .claude/rules/.'
